_comment: Celo mainnet (chainId 42220). Mainnet-EARLY per GATE 0 decision: ship a thin slice here so a real circle accrues txs + 8004 reputation (2 of 3 tracks reward this). SEPARATE mainnet key (CLAUDE.md §1.5). Mento rebrand: cUSD->USDm, cNGN->NGNm. circle/factory filled at mainnet deploy.
_seedTokenNote: Phase-6 mainnet seed circle uses real Tether USD₮ (USDT, 6 decimals, verified on-chain 2026-06-13) because that is what the funded agent key holds (4.04). USDm/NGNm remain the canonical Mento entries for production circles. LOUD/honest per CLAUDE.md §1.9.
